images.prompt: Minimal flat illustration showing a laptop, passport, and world map with dotted travel routes, representing digital nomad lifestyle and remote work abroad. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with subtle blue accents, no people, no text, no medical imagery, professional utility style, simple shapes, lots of white space, calm and trustworthy.

Minimal flat icon of a suitcase with a small shield or protection symbol, representing travel insurance coverage. Simple line style, white background, neutral gray with blue accent, no text, clean geometric shapes, professional icon style.

Minimal flat icon of a document with a globe symbol and checkmark, representing international health coverage. Simple line style, white background, neutral gray with blue accent, no text, clean geometric shapes, professional icon style.

Minimal flat icon of multiple location pins connected by dotted lines on an abstract map shape, representing location flexibility and moving between countries. Simple line style, white background, neutral gray with blue accent, no text, clean and minimal.
